## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and green locally (`yarn test`)
- [ ] Lint + format clean (`yarn lint`, `yarn format:check`)
- [ ] No secrets, keys or `.env` values committed
- [ ] `.env.example` / docs updated if configuration changed
- [ ] Changed/added API endpoints carry exhaustive Swagger annotations with examples (per #18)
- [ ] Conventional commit message(s) with required scope
